• Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated worlds.
  • Features include building, crafting, trading, and a shop system with upgrades and consumables.
  • Supports both singleplayer and multiplayer modes with real-time synchronization.
  • Includes a custom UI system with mobile controls, chat, and an admin panel.
  • Utilizes MQTT for network communication and IndexedDB for local save storage.
    const TILE_TYPES = { EMPTY: 0, DIRT: 1, COAL: 6, IRON: 7, GOLD: 8, DIAMOND: 9, ... };
    const CONSTANTS = { TILE_SIZE: 32, CHUNK_SIZE: 16, MAP_WIDTH: 1000, MAP_HEIGHT: 2000 };
    class GameEngine { update() { /* movement, mining, rendering */ } draw() { /* optimized rendering */ } };

Mega Miner NG is a comprehensive mining game featuring procedurally generated worlds, real-time multiplayer functionality, and extensive building/crafting systems. The game includes a sophisticated UI with mobile controls, chat, and admin features, while utilizing MQTT for network communication and IndexedDB for persistent storage. Players can mine various resources, upgrade equipment, trade with others, and explore an infinite underground world with dynamic lighting and particle effects.
